meta.notes: v1.0.9 installed from CMS via direct API call (GET /api/hub/install?id=video-captions). Proxy API waterfall transcription (Whisper → Deepgram → Gemini) active — no local faster-whisper. Significant perf improvement vs round 1 (local whisper): 18.7s vs 29.1s script runtime.

test_input.name: charli-daily-vlog.mp4
test_input.description: Charli D'Amelio daily vlog, TikTok-style vertical short-form video

task.name: video-captions
task.purpose: Add TikTok-style word-by-word purple highlight captions to a 67.8s vertical 720x1280 HEVC video using proxy API transcription
task.expected_output: MP4 with burned-in TikTok-style single-word captions, purple highlight, Bebas Neue font, all caps

install.notes: CMS API direct call worked perfectly (117ms). Zip 112KB downloaded in 153ms, extracted in 9ms. rootPrefix='video-captions/' - flattened correctly. v1.0.9: 1098 lines (vs 770 old), proxy API waterfall confirmed (19 occurrences). Subagent boot 14.6s.

steps.name: caption_script_full
steps.notes: Proxy API waterfall transcription: Whisper API hit first, succeeded (134 words, auto-detect en). Silence alignment, .ass generation, ffmpeg burn all included. 0.28x realtime (18.7s / 67.8s) — significant improvement vs local faster-whisper (0.43x).

steps.name: extract_audio
steps.notes: Internal to script, not separately timed

steps.name: whisper_api_transcribe
steps.notes: Proxy API waterfall — Whisper hit first, succeeded. 134 words detected.

steps.name: ffmpeg_burn
steps.notes: HEVC→H.264 re-encode with caption overlay. Still the estimated bottleneck at ~70% of script time.

execution.notes: caption_video.py v1.0.9 ran in 18.655s for 67.8s video = 0.28x realtime. Previous round with local faster-whisper: 29.14s (0.43x). Proxy API waterfall saved ~10.5s (36% faster).

delivery.notes: Output 30752KB vs 4790KB input (6.4x size — HEVC→H.264 transcode). Upload ~1.79 MB/s (17.6s for 31MB).
